prompt:
A premium automotive advertisement poster featuring a bright red Ferrari SF90 Stradale, shown in a dramatic rear 3/4 angle view. The car is placed in a clean, seamless studio environment with a bold monochrome deep red background.

Massive stretched typography “FERRARI” dominates the background in a modern bold font, slightly faded and blending into the backdrop, creating depth and a luxury brand feel.

The car is ultra-detailed with glossy paint reflections, visible carbon fiber accents, aggressive rear diffuser, dual exhausts, aerodynamic wing, and sharp LED taillights. Lighting is cinematic and directional, highlighting contours, curves, and performance-focused design.

At the top center, include a minimal Ferrari-style branding area with a small logo and text:
“SF90 STRADALE”
with thin divider lines for a clean premium look.

Below the car, place a refined text box:
“Ferrari — Where Power Meets Perfection”
Include a short elegant paragraph describing speed, precision engineering, and racing heritage.

On the right side, align performance specs in a clean layout:
“530 kW / 720 PS”
“0–100 km/h in 2.9 s”
“Top Speed 340 km/h”

Use subtle shadows under the car for realism. Maintain a minimal yet aggressive composition with strong visual hierarchy.

Ultra-realistic, 8K resolution, sharp focus, luxury commercial poster design, high contrast, vibrant Ferrari red tones, professional automotive photography style, cinematic lighting, premium branding aesthetic.
